sourceMovie.title: The Spy Who Dumped Me
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: The Spy Who Dumped Me (2018) stuck because it commits to its comedy premise without apologizing—viewers remember set pieces and momentum as much as plot. Susanna Fogel's control of tone keeps the ride coherent. The comedy and action blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Kingsman: The Golden Circle
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If The Spy Who Dumped Me clicked for you, Kingsman: The Golden Circle (2017) is a strong next stop: both trade in comedy and action, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after The Spy Who Dumped Me?
faq.answer: Try Kingsman: The Golden Circle, The Man from U.N.C.L.E., Charlie's Angels—each shares DNA with The Spy Who Dumped Me while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is The Spy Who Dumped Me?
faq.answer: The Spy Who Dumped Me (2018) is best described as Comedy, Action, Adventure. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is The Spy Who Dumped Me worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 6.4/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this comedy lane.
